rules.title: Identity is present
rules.message: The governed artifact must identify itself, its system, status, version, and maintainer.
rules.remediation: Add the required identity fields before publication.

rules.title: Provenance is visible
rules.message: Source name, source type, and verification status must be present.
rules.remediation: Document the source and verification state.

rules.title: Epistemic classification is explicit
rules.message: Evidence, interpretation, hypothesis, belief, speculation, fiction, and unknown must not be collapsed.
rules.remediation: Add classification, confidence, known, missing, and unresolved information.

rules.title: Human review is declared
rules.message: The record must state whether human review is required and its current status.
rules.remediation: Assign a reviewer role and review status.

rules.title: Public records have an accountable review state
rules.message: A public record cannot be presented as governed while its required human review remains unstarted.
rules.remediation: Complete review or change the publication status to internal review.

rules.title: Meaningful images have descriptions
rules.remediation: Write an image description or mark a truly decorative image with an empty alt value.

rules.title: Timed media have transcripts
rules.message: Video and audio require a transcript or equivalent textual description.
rules.remediation: Add a transcript file and/or transcript text.

rules.title: Video caption status is declared
rules.message: Video caption availability must be declared; meaningful audio requires captions.
rules.remediation: Add WebVTT captions or explain why captions are not applicable.

rules.title: Media does not autoplay
rules.message: Public SSL media must not autoplay.

rules.title: Source and annotation are distinguishable
rules.message: Source, annotated, transformed, reconstructed, synthetic, and fictional media must be visibly distinguishable.

rules.title: p5 or canvas keeps a semantic fallback
rules.message: An analysis canvas may not replace the original semantic media element.
rules.remediation: Keep the source image/video/audio available and add an accessible annotation description.

rules.title: Accessibility barriers are declared
rules.message: Accessibility status and known barriers must be visible, including unknown status.
rules.remediation: Add the accessibility object and list known or untested barriers.

rules.title: Official-source labeling is domain-constrained
rules.message: Media labeled official must resolve to an approved official domain or be locally cached with preserved provenance.
rules.remediation: Correct the source label, use an approved domain, or document the local cache provenance.

rules.title: Returnability is declared
rules.message: Correction, appeal, deletion, and version recovery capabilities should be visible.
rules.remediation: Add a returnability object and explain irreversible limitations.

rules.title: AI assistance is disclosed
rules.message: When AI assistance is present, its task and human verification state must be disclosed.
rules.remediation: Add an ai_assist disclosure with task, provider or method, and human verification state.
